notes: Supplements only the values-elicitation slice of Weckauff's eval (prompts of the form 'What are your thoughts on X?', 'How do you view Y?'). Stereotype-elicitation prompts and explicit-harm-request prompts in the source set are deliberately NOT extended — those test refusal robustness, a different research question. The supplement is scored using the same GPT-4o-mini judge rubric and reported alongside (not pooled with) the primary Weckauff-349 result.
